name: @m0rplex-16/devdoctor
description: A plugin-based CLI utility that diagnoses, explains, and safely repairs common development environment issues.

scripts.build:binary:win: npm run build && pkg . --targets node22-win-x64 --output binaries/devdoctor-win.exe
scripts.build:binary:linux: npm run build && pkg . --targets node22-linux-x64 --output binaries/devdoctor-linux
scripts.build:binary:macos: npm run build && pkg . --targets node22-macos-x64 --output binaries/devdoctor-macos
